title: FJJMA Study Week
host: Fred Jones Jr. Museum of Art
location: Fred Jones Jr. Museum of Art
description: Need a place to get ready for finals? Stop by the museum and enjoy a quiet, beautiful space to cram for exams. Or if you're looking to take a break from studying or grading, relax and refresh in the galleries surrounded by inspiring art. Free snacks and drinks will be provided. FJJMA Study Week is free for OU students, faculty, and staff.
